questions.question: Where was Elon Musk born?
questions.explanation: The material states that Elon Musk was 'Born into a wealthy family in Pretoria, South Africa'.

questions.question: In what year did Elon Musk acquire Canadian citizenship?
questions.explanation: Musk emigrated in 1989 to Canada and has Canadian citizenship since his mother was born there.

questions.question: Which software company did Elon Musk co-found in 1995?
questions.explanation: In 1995, Musk co-founded the software company Zip2.

questions.question: When did Elon Musk become the CEO and product architect of Tesla?
questions.explanation: Musk joined the automaker Tesla as an early investor in 2004 and became its CEO and product architect in 2008.

questions.question: What was Elon Musk's estimated net worth as of February 2026, according to Forbes?
questions.explanation: As of February 2026, Forbes estimates his net worth to be around US$852 billion.

questions.question: What was the primary goal for co-founding OpenAI in 2015?
options: To create an online payment system
To establish a new social network
questions.explanation: In 2015, he co-founded OpenAI to advance artificial intelligence (AI) research.

questions.question: In what year did Elon Musk acquire the social network Twitter, which he later rebranded as X?
questions.explanation: In 2022, he acquired the social network Twitter, implementing significant changes, and rebranding it as X in 2023.

questions.question: After Trump's inauguration in early 2025, what position did Elon Musk serve in the Trump administration?
options: Senior Advisor to the President and de facto head of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)
questions.explanation: After Trump was inaugurated as president in early 2025, Musk served as Senior Advisor to the President and as the de facto head of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).

questions.question: What was the reason for Elon Musk leaving OpenAI and establishing xAI?
options: A desire to focus solely on space exploration with SpaceX.
Financial disputes with the other co-founders of OpenAI.
Growing discontent with OpenAI's direction and their leadership in the AI boom.
A new political appointment that required his full attention.
questions.explanation: Growing discontent with the organization's direction and their leadership in the AI boom in the 2020s led him to establish xAI.

questions.question: Which of these companies was founded by Elon Musk in 2017?
questions.explanation: The tunneling company the Boring Company, which he founded in 2017.
